ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the content */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic or category of the content */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the content */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., blog post, news article, social media post) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the content */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant keywords or tags for the content */,
  "is_draft" INTEGER /* Whether the content is a draft or published */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the content was published */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the content was created */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the content has received */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_topic FOREIGN KEY ("topic") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Author's areas of expertise */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., administrator, moderator, regular user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* Parent topic ID for hierarchical topics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the comment is on */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the comment */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "reply_to_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to */,
  "comment_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "upvotes" (
  "upvote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upvote */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the upvote is on */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the upvote */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the upvote was made */,
  "upvote_type" TEXT /* Type of upvote (e.g., like, dislike) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upvote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upvotes_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upvotes_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether the role is the default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_group" TEXT /* Group the permission belongs to (e.g., content, comments, users) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the analytics are for */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked (e.g., views, engagement, clicks) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the analytics were collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each piece of content
